name: Broccoli Shrimp Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups shredded cheddar cheese, lowfat, Healthy C
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles to desired doneness as directed on package; drain.
2. Rinse with hot water.
3. Meanwhile, melt margarine in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour, onions, salt, dry mustard, thyme and ground cayenne pepper. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Cook and stir until the mixture is bubbly and thickened. Remove from heat. Add monterey jack cheese; stir until melted.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. In an ungreased 13x9-inch (3-quart) baking dish, layer 1/2 cup sauce, 3 noodles, all of the broccoli, 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese and 1 cup sauce.
6. Top with remaining noodles, all of the shrimp, 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese, the remaining sauce and the remaining cheese.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
